notes: Legacy TDIST follows the two-tail T distribution lane.
Legacy TINV follows the two-tail T inverse lane.
Legacy NORMDIST follows the modern cumulative lane.
Legacy NORMINV follows the modern inverse lane.
Legacy NORMSDIST follows the modern standard-normal cumulative lane.
Legacy NORMSINV follows the modern standard-normal inverse lane.
Legacy LOGNORMDIST follows the cumulative lognormal lane.
Legacy LOGINV follows the modern lognormal inverse lane.
Legacy COVAR follows the covariance population lane.
Legacy MODE follows the single-mode lane.
Legacy PERCENTILE follows the inclusive percentile lane.
Legacy PERCENTRANK follows the inclusive percent-rank lane.
Legacy QUARTILE follows the inclusive quartile lane.
Two-tail T distribution rejects negative x.
Mode publishes #N/A when no repeated value exists.
